name: sniff-check
description: 🎯 Opinionated TypeScript/Next.js Development Toolkit - Find large files, unused imports, broken imports, and enforce code quality standards with lightning speed

scripts.preinstall: node -e "const g=process.env.npm_config_global;const sd=process.env.npm_config_save_dev;const so=process.env.npm_config_save_optional;const prod=process.env.NODE_ENV==='production';if(!g&&!sd&&!so||prod){console.error('❌ sniff-check should be installed globally (npm install -g sniff-check) or as a devDependency (npm install --save-dev sniff-check)');process.exit(1)}"

author: Rizky Viali
